developer_response.body:
Thanks, House! You're a 10/10 player!!!

We're going to add a new store with some new avatars soon, so keep coming back and playing with us.

Join the Remio Discord too, so you can meet other players like you: https://discord.gg/Jx5Pzmcv

reviews.review_description: Some people want to play tag and I’m one of the people that likes the glitched version. It was way more butter I don’t want to vote everyone wants to do tag and I just wish there was like something that you can just do modes on. It’s not really that fun anymore so this is why I installed it. I will play I will play when this happens I’m sure enough I’m going to play next year hopefully I hope I do get to play it again soon because I really like this game except for the infection part… I’m one of those people who likes casual more than an infection.

developer_response.body:
Hello, thanks for trying out WingIt and glad that you enjoyed the social experience of the game.

We'll consider introducing a casual mode if more people want it. In the meantime, we need more people to find the game, so everyone can get a mode that makes them happy.

You're also welcome to join our Discord channel to tell us more: https://discord.gg/ESMwwfjE

developer_response.body:
Sorry for the trouble loading and that you didn't get to try the game. It's possible that you got stuck with the permissions that Meta requires.

Be sure to check your permissions and re-install if necessary. Most people are getting into the app successfully.

reviews.review_description: When I put my name in it just gets stuck at a black screen with loading on it if you can fix these please reply

developer_response.body:
Hey Ronald, I'm not sure why this issue occurred. It could be because of networking issues. We just had an update on October 14th, so try again and reevaluate the app if you have better luck.

Update: Some players haven't been able to join because they haven't updated their Operating System. Please do this update and try again. Then, try the game before you give it a rating.

You may communicate with us here also: https://discord.gg/peJxBuTt

reviews.review_description: Love the game its just that the map seems a bit small, but other than that its pretty fun

I never thought I'd try something like this, but in real life I'm a motorized hang glider pilot and therefore I necessarily have to try everything related to VR flying, even this being a game for children. I was surprised to hear voices of really young children, I think it could be a fun game, if I had a child I would rather let him play this instead of gorilla tag. all in all it needs improvements: .... well it's useless to say which ones because like all children's games it will remain at a fairly crude stage, so the important thing is that the children have fun being parrots and flying!

developer_response.body:
Thanks! We worked really hard on getting the mechanic right, so I'm glad to hear from an expert.

WingIt is part of a larger game called Remio, which I recommend trying. If you set up a private server there, you can play this game with your adult friends also.

If you have other suggestions, please join us on Discord: https://discord.gg/TtMxAmeW

We've released an update that fixes this issue, you will be able to play the full game now!
